widget_learnings.note: ThemeREX stores post limit as "count" (confirmed via elementor_controls_usage in DB). Default value 3 is NOT written to JSON — must explicitly set count=N when adding posts.
Category ID stored as "cat" (not "category"). Homepage New Programs section uses cat=62.
Same pattern as trx_sc_services — count field may not be in JSON if never changed from default.

task_outcomes.title: Add fourth program card to homepage Programs section
task_outcomes.note: CPT post created in cat 62, count set explicitly

site_quirks.note: WP Application Password auth fails silently on WP Engine — use X-Agent-Token header instead.
Railway blocks outbound port 22 — SSH impossible. All WP operations go through brinda-agent REST plugin over HTTPS.
ThemeREX CPT widgets (trx_sc_services etc) use taxonomy slug "cpt_services_group" NOT "services_group" for cpt_services posts.
trx_sc_price is a pricing widget, NOT a services card widget — do not treat as add-card target.
Elementor Page #XXXX titles are library templates, not real pages — skip in page matching.
